series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to awarded Contracts between the Department of Natural Resources and Consultants regarding Capital Projects including, but not limited to, original Contracts and Supplements, Termination Letters, project correspondence, studies & reports, master plans, budget and production reports, and similar documents Also, Requests for Qualifications, Statements of Qualifications, Technical Proposals, Individual and Tally Scoresheets (GC, Multiple Prime, CMR, and DB), Question and Answer documents, Guaranteed Maximum Price Proposals, Fee Proposals, amendments and supplements to such records, Short List Letters, Interview Letters, Approval Letters, Award Letters, Contract Amendment Checklists, Requests for Approval of Contracts, Project Initiation Forms, Stage Submission Forms, Total Cost Worksheets, Permits and Permit Applications, and similar documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 30 years unless converted to an electronic format. Once scanned, paper copy may be shredded. ; Electronic: Retain for 30 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
